subject: style(hero): add sky blue color to glasses icon
body:
Frames change from gray (#d4d4d4) to sky blue (#38bdf8) to match
chart accent color. Lens cutouts get a subtle dark blue tint (#0c1a2e)
instead of pure black, giving the glasses a cohesive colored look.

Tags: styling, svg, branding
